name: v2.7.0
body:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v2.7.0 -->

> [!WARNING]
> As per our version release policy, we are dropping support for Go 1.24 after the release of Go 1.26. Our minimum supported Go release is now Go 1.25.

> [!NOTE]
> v2.7.0 introduces a new method of tracking errors. In most cases, this should not break existing error traces if you are using Error Tracking. If you have problems, please feel free to open an issue!

## What's Changed
### Application Performance Monitoring (APM)
* feat(echo.v4): traffic-less API Discovery by @RomainMuller in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4306
* chore: v2.7.0-dev.1 by @nsrip-dd in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4341
* fix(appsec/proxies): show real version image based on build vars by @e-n-0 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4348
* chore(ddtrace/tracer): migrate to locking.*Mutex to enable dynamic lock checks by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4359
* refactor(instrumentation/mcp): replace `ddtrace` argument with `telemetry` by @jboolean in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4335
* fix(contrib/aws/datadog-lambda-go): start tracer while initializing lambda listener by @shreyamalpani in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4371
* feat(contrib/gomongodb.org/mongo-driver): add optional query tag truncation by @colinking in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/3679
* fix(mark3labs/mcp): fix concurrent writes bug in intent capture by @jboolean in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4362
* fix(contrib/database/sql): bump `lib/pq` to v1.11.1 by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4385
* feat(contrib/redis): add Redis raw command env toggle by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4389
* feat: bump `DataDog/datadog-agent/pkg/*` to v0.75.2 by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4399
* docs(contrib/aws/datadog-lambda-go): add README with migration guidance by @Dogbu-cyber in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4378
* chore: bump minimum support Go version to 1.25 by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4403
* fix: make lint pass clean(er) by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4390
* fix(appsec): align downstream body analysis env var with RFC by @RomainMuller in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4398
* docs: update supported integrations documentation by @dd-octo-sts[bot] in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4325
* chore(deps): upgrade go-runtime-metrics-internal by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4428
* fix(contrib/valkey-io/valkey-go): support dedicated client by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4419
* fix(contrib/go-sdk): upgrade go-sdk to v1.3.0, fix concurrent writes in intent capture by @jboolean in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4432
* fix(orchestrion): prevent GLS memory leak from unpaired executionTracedKey pushes by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4410
* chore: upgrade gofiber to v2.52.11 by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4441
* fix: bump go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk to v1.40.0 by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4455
* fix: pin k8s.io/* deps to non-alpha v0.35.1 by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4466
* fix: Disable client-side trace stats computation in Lambda by @joeyzhao2018 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4471
* chore: bump klauspost/compress to v1.81.2 (skip retracted v1.81.1) and golang.org/x/net to v0.50.0 by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4459
* chore: bump golang.org/x/net to v0.51.0 by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4485
### General
* fix: skip benchmarks on merge queue by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4343
* chore: Fix several linter issues by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4347
* fix: improve benchmarks aggregation by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4349
* fix: empty decision maker causes errors by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4165
* fix: incorrect encoding/decoding of span link traceIDs by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4351
* ci: upload test reports for smoke tests by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4336
* fix(civisibility): Use -c flag for git safe.directory instead of modifying global config by @anmarchenko in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4344
* chore(otel): add telemetry metrics for OpenTelemetry Metrics Configurations by @rachelyangdog in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4266
* ci(workflows): update system tests proxies scenarios by @e-n-0 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4339
* revert: don't aggregate benchmarks results by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4355
* ci: make sure benchmarks do not run on mq branches by @faydef in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4354
* fix(stats): Remove header when client_drop_p0=false by @ichinaski in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4342
* refactor(tracer): encapsulate span mutex access behind helper methods by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4338
* ci: solve incident 48034 by @faydef in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4356
* fix: [openfeature] allow empty targeting key in exposure events by @leoromanovsky in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4361
* chore(scripts): improve checklocks script by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4358
* chore(ddtrace/tracer): add checkatomic annotations by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4363
* chore: use (again) `registry.datadoghq.com` to pull agent in CI by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4357
* ci: upload test reports for appsec tests by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4323
* fix(remoteconfig): prevent targets_version reset and always report config_states by @RomainMuller in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4366
* ci: update config inversion CI scripts settings by @genesor in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4365
* fix(appsec): lowercase downstream request headers for WAF by @RomainMuller in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4367
* fix(internal/config): fix hostname lookup  by @genesor in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4373
* chore(internal/config): cover #4373 changes by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4376
* fix(civisibility): improve ci.job.url format for GitHub Actions by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4380
* feat(civisibility): add test.final_status tag for adjusted test outcomes by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4379
* chore(ci): disable gotip schedule by @cbeauchesne in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4381
* chore(ci): fix test ownership attribution by @cbeauchesne in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4382
* fix(appsec): use path instead of product as status map key in RC update handler by @RomainMuller in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4386
* feat(internal/config): change internalconfig behavior to use a fresh instance upon tracer creation by @genesor in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4392
* chore(ci): fox typo in codeowners by @cbeauchesne in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4396
* feat(config): migrate supported_configurations.json file to v2 format by @genesor in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4374
* feat(otel): adding support for OpenTelemetry logs by @rachelyangdog in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4350
* feat(v2fix): expand analyzer coverage and harden suggested fix generation by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4393
* feat(version): drop v1 version detection by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4409
* chore(ci): add nofilter for reviewdog by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4418
* chore(deps): bump the gh-actions-packages group across 3 directories with 15 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4411
* feat(contrib): Add rs/zerolog ddtracer integration by @takanuva15 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4370
* feat(ddtrace/tracer): drop string concatenations in `prioritySampler.getRate` by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4423
* chore(ddtrace/tracer): add checklock annotations by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4364
* fix: various fixes to ETP encoding by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4430
* refactor(stacktrace): remove unused UnwindOption types and constructors by @felixge in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4422
* refactor(tracer): add checklocks annotations and lock assertions to Trace struct by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4406
* refactor(tracer): add checklocks annotations to SpanContext by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4407
* fix(profiler/test): use atomic.Pointer[string] for containerID/entityID to prevent data race by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4438
* fix(appsec): add rel=noopener noreferrer to blocked template link by @RomainMuller in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4437
* feat(claude): add checklocks annotation skill by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4405
* fix(ci): update oldstable Go version to 1.25.7 in macrobenchmarks by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4444
* refactor: modernize Go code via go fix (Go 1.25+) by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4448
* feat: change environment variable used to set ETP by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4446
* chore(ci): introduce code freeze flow using milestones by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4276
* fix(telemetry): skip agent proxy URL when agent doesn't expose /telemetry/proxy/ by @eliottness in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4454
* fix: appsec enablement at startup for resource renaming by @e-n-0 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4447
* feat(internal/samplernames): decision maker string conversion by lookup table by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4424
* fix(tracer): don't start telemetry when there is no agent in stdout lambda mode by @eliottness in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4464
* fix(orchestrion/_integration): prevent TOCTOU race between mock agent and tested services by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4457
* fix: pulling datadog-agent@main doesn't build by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4391
* refactor(tracer): extract `setTagLocked` from `SetTag` for use during span construction by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4425
* chore(ci): rewrite add-codeowners action in Go by @nsrip-dd in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4467
* fix: span event array attributes in v1 payload format by @ajgajg1134 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4469
* fix(tracer): incremental per-chunk encoding in payloadV1 by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4461
* feat(ddtrace/tracer): optimize tracer Git metadata tags updates by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4472
* fix(internal/civisibility): increase test time sleep from 100ms to 2s to avoid flakiness in CI by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4473
* refactor(tracer): add checklocks annotations to Span struct by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4408
* feat(datastreams): add manual transaction checkpoint tracking by @ericfirth in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4468
* chore: re-add error tracking changes by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4322

## New Contributors
* @anmarchenko made their first contribution in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4344
* @shreyamalpani made their first contribution in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4371
* @colinking made their first contribution in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/3679
* @takanuva15 made their first contribution in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4370

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/compare/v2.6.0...v2.7.0
